title: Jah Algorithm
productionNotes: Open with sparse 808 bounce and bright Afrobeats guitar plucks in G major. Layer in log drum and shaker patterns at 92 BPM with syncopated dancehall riddim. Drop heavy 808 slides on chorus emphasizing swagger. Use vocoder effects on 'algorithm' for digital texture contrast. Bridge strips to just hand drums and vocal, then builds back with full percussion and melodic steel pan accents for final chorus.
intro:
Yeh yeh yeh
Dem t'ink dem smart, yuh know
But Jah code run deeper
Much deeper, seen?
(Algorithm, algorithm)
verse1:
Dem have algorithm fi track yuh every move
But Selassie I mathematics cyaan prove
Yuh scroll and scroll till yuh soul get bruise
Mi check di Most High newsfeed, mi nah lose
Dem want fi mine yuh data, sell yuh back yuh face
But ancestral wisdom nuh need database
Mi meditation stronger than dem server space
Jah program mi DNA with righteous grace
prechorus:
So mi delete, delete, delete di negative
Upload, upload, upload di positive
Mi source code written inna Genesis
Divine intelligence, yuh cyaan hack dis
chorus:
Jah algorithm know mi better than Google
Ancient technology, dem cyaan refuel
Jah algorithm run pon spiritual
While Babylon system crash down pon di pull
Jah algorithm (hey!), Jah algorithm (hey!)
No need fi Wi-Fi when yuh have Most High-Fi
Jah algorithm (hey!), Jah algorithm (hey!)
Di original code weh di devil cyaan spy
verse2:
Dem think seh AI a di future revelation
But Jah I consciousness transcend computation
Yuh TikTok dance while yuh lose yuh foundation
Mi do di Nyabinghi, dat's real vibration
Dem cloud storage full up with illusion
Mi download wisdom through meditation
No need verify, no two-step confusion
Mi heart di password to di I-nity connection
bridge:
Unplug from di matrix (unplug!)
Plug into di I-rator (plug in!)
Dem have data package (dem have!)
Wi have Creator (Selassie I!)
No blue check badge
Just righteous behavior
Jah timeline eternal
Forever and ever
outro:
Yeh, yeh, yeh
Jah algorithm run t'ings
(Algorithm, algorithm)
From creation to now
(Jah algorithm)
Undefeated, unseen
But always felt, seen?
Digital Babylon cyaan compete
Rastafari!
promptForSuno: Afrobeats dancehall riddim 92 BPM, deep warm Jamaican male baritone vocal with authentic patois flow, 808 bounce with syncopated log drum patterns, bright guitar plucks in G major, playful confident delivery, call-and-response 'hey!' adlibs, vocoder effect on word 'algorithm', steel pan accent melodies, spiritual swagger energy, modern production with traditional percussion, clean mix with heavy bass, dancehall head-nod groove
